notes: Seed weights derived from PRINCIPLES.md priors. Champion metric is null until the first tuner run completes on real outcomes. The tuner will only overwrite this file if the challenger's metric strictly beats the champion's; otherwise this file is unchanged.
_distribution_veto_mode_help: shadow = trace-only (default, zero live impact). block = short-circuit ticker on veto (auto-adds 'DV' to hard_gate_stage_ids at load time). Flip only after ≥4 weeks of shadow traces confirm veto precision against outcomes. See backend/stages/distribution_veto.py for the three checks.
